title: vieusseuxia villosa
intro: Vieusseuxia villosa, a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae, is also known as the hairy menispermum. It is a shrub native to China and parts of Southeast Asia, with medicinal properties attributed to its root and stem. Vieusseuxia villosa has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions and infusions, which can be taken internally to alleviate various health conditions.
